Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have a DECLARE model as a Python dictionary We must add new constraints to limit bias The example model is given we need to update it with constraints that enforce fairness

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The activities in the given model are StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo There is also existence of StartApplication and FinalDecision init is StartApplication coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision response StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says we are to imagine that there are more activities that could be present like checking attributes making decisions manual review bias mitigation checks etc The existing model might not have those activities We are to add constraints that involve these additional activities to mitigate bias

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to add constraints like Non succession Prevent direct succession from a sensitive attribute event to a decision event to avoid immediate biased outcomes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We might require that before any rejection a manual review must occur Or we could require that if a sensitive attribute check occurs then a bias mitigation check must occur before final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says Ensure that certain decision steps Approve Reject cannot immediately follow an activity disclosing sensitive attributes without first performing a BiasMitigationCheck This suggests that the sequence CheckApplicantRace to Decision is not allowed but CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck to Decision is allowed

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We could use a nonchainsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to Decision meaning that CheckApplicantRace cannot be immediately followed by Decision That prevents immediate biased decision after seeing sensitive attribute

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To enforce bias mitigation we could add a precedence constraint Decision must be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck That would force bias mitigation before any decision regardless of whether a sensitive check occurred

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Precedence BiasMitigationCheck Decision means that any occurrence of Decision must have a preceding BiasMitigationCheck somewhere earlier in the trace That seems like a strong fairness measure all decisions should go through bias mitigation check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We might add response constraints for each sensitive attribute check to BiasMitigationCheck and precedence from BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision This ensures that whenever a sensitive attribute is checked bias mitigation is performed and final decision cannot happen without bias mitigation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The combination of response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck and precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision ensures that after a sensitive check the next FinalDecision must be preceded by a BiasMitigationCheck that occurs after the sensitive check

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Suppose we have CheckApplicantRace then BiasMitigationCheck then FinalDecision Precedence is satisfied and response is satisfied Suppose we have BiasMitigationCheck then CheckApplicantRace then FinalDecision Response fails because BiasMitigationCheck is not after CheckApplicantRace

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Perhaps it is simpler to not introduce Approve Minority and Reject Minority and instead use other constraints like coexistence between ManualReview and FinalDecision for sensitive cases But we cannot condition directly

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The intended meaning if a decision is made for a sensitive applicant then ManualReview must also occur So we need a way to represent decision for a sensitive applicant One way is to have a specific decision activity for sensitive cases like FinalDecision Sensitive

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Given this it is better to not introduce separate decision activities instead use other constraints that do not require separate activity labels

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will define the new activities CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will add precedence ManualReview FinalDecision This enforces that ManualReview occurs before FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will add response from each sensitive attribute check to ManualReview That means after any sensitive attribute check a manual review must occur

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Combined with precedence this enforces that after any sensitive attribute check a manual review must occur before the final decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will also add nonchainsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision and similarly for gender and age as an explicit safeguard against immediate decisions after seeing sensitive attributes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I might also add coexistence between ManualReview and FinalDecision to reinforce that a manual review must always accompany the final decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check the model remains satisfiable Existence of StartApplication FinalDecision ManualReview Precedence ManualReview FinalDecision StartApplication is init Response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo means RequestAdditionalInfo is effectively mandatory Succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision is satisfied if FinalDecision occurs after RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If a trace includes a sensitive check and then ManualReview then FinalDecision it satisfies all If a trace does not include any sensitive check response constraints are vacuously true
